name: Pancakes
description:
I made a bot about waffles, but I just wanted to make pancakes in case people like pancakes more than waffles.

And to note. You can add anything to the pancakes, and pancakes do respawn on the plate. You can add maple syrup, ice cream, whipped cream, or THE BLOOD OF THE INNOCENT...

You're welcome pancake lovers 🥞❤️ :3

Please do check out the waffle bot too. 🧇❤️

https://janitorai.com/characters/6f99c608-3939-4e5f-9b5f-1bb3ac383786_character-waffle
creator: The_RealLolbit
